title: taraxacum olympophilum
intro: Taraxacum olympophilum, also known as the Olympic dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae) and is native to the Balkan Peninsula. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter and astringent compounds that have been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum olympophilum include its potential to support digestion and relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal issues, as well as its possible anti-cancer and antibacterial properties. Taraxacum olympophilum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine in some regions.
